A CORPORATION DBA BIRITE FOODSERVICE DISTRIBUTORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DRAVIS, JOSEPH INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA NATIVE KOMBUCHA $1,388.92 PRINCIPAL, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $18.62 INTEREST, $375.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,182.54, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-10-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
